vocab.example: Winning the championship was the result of a true collective endeavor rather than individual brilliance.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng/thấm nhuần tinh thần cạnh tranh
vocab.example: Being part of the swim team helped instill a competitive spirit in me from a very young age.

vocab.meaning: sự nhạy bén về mặt chiến thuật
vocab.example: Our captain was renowned for his tactical acumen, often making game-changing decisions under pressure.

vocab.meaning: trách nhiệm giải trình lẫn nhau (cùng chịu trách nhiệm)
vocab.example: Team sports teach mutual accountability, as every member’s performance directly impacts the final outcome.

vocab.meaning: sự cam kết kiên định/không lay chuyển
vocab.example: To remain in the starting lineup, I had to demonstrate unwavering commitment to our grueling training schedule.

vocab.meaning: tạo ra những mối quan hệ gắn bó bền vững
vocab.example: The shared hardships of pre-season training allowed us to forge lasting bonds that extend far beyond the pitch.
Relay racing requires harmonious coordination between runners to ensure a smooth baton exchange.
One of my most cherished memories is when our underdog team managed to triumph over adversity in the finals.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thuộc về một nơi nào đó/sự gắn kết
vocab.example: Joining the local cricket club provided me with a sense of belonging when I first moved to the city.

vocab.meaning: nền tảng của sự thành công
vocab.example: Effective communication between the players and the coaching staff is the bedrock of success in professional sports.
